title: elongatia atrohiata
intro: Elongatia atrohiata, also known as the 'Dark-stemmed Elongatia', is a type of plant species found in certain regions, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. The herbal preparations of Elongatia atrohiata often involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can be used in teas, infusions, or as a topical application.
